prompt: Create an app that helps me manage projects from my phone terminal with APIs, CLI tools, browser UI, import/export, and tests.
principle: The app creator can create and improve itself through the same gated workflow it applies to target apps.
hard_limits: No fake claim of searching the entire web without approved live research adapters.
No cloud writes or deploys without explicit approval.
Target app data never belongs in the generic OS repo.

research_graph.prompt: Create an app that helps me manage projects from my phone terminal with APIs, CLI tools, browser UI, import/export, and tests.
research_graph.limitation: This is a bounded research graph. Live market research requires approved adapters.

nodes.label: Create an app that helps me manage projects from my phone terminal with APIs, CLI tools, browser UI, import/export, and tests.
AI app builders
nodes.rationale: Systems that create runnable apps from intent.

nodes.label: Agent operating systems
nodes.rationale: Tool, model, permission, and workflow orchestration layers.

nodes.label: Low-code and no-code platforms
nodes.rationale: Related systems that compose apps from high-level instructions.

nodes.label: Cloud IDE automation
nodes.rationale: Systems connecting files, terminal, git, deploy, and previews.

nodes.label: Prompt-to-app workflows
nodes.rationale: Natural language converted into files, APIs, UI, tests, and deployment plans.

nodes.label: Provider registry
nodes.rationale: Every model, API, CLI, storage, and search tool must be a typed adapter.

nodes.label: Permission gates
nodes.rationale: Dangerous actions require explicit approval manifests.

nodes.label: Self inspection
nodes.rationale: The app can inspect its own repo and generate improvement plans.

nodes.label: Recursive bootstrap
nodes.rationale: The system can apply its own workflow to improve itself.

nodes.label: Proof first execution
nodes.rationale: Compile and proof gates precede commits and deployments.

nodes.label: Mobile terminal first
nodes.rationale: The system must work from Android Termux.

nodes.label: Secret Manager first
nodes.rationale: Credentials must be referenced safely and never printed.

research_queries.prompt: Create an app that helps me manage projects from my phone terminal with APIs, CLI tools, browser UI, import/export, and tests.
queries: Create an app that helps me manage projects from my phone terminal with APIs, CLI tools, browser UI, import/export, and tests.
AI app builder agent platform terminal CLI
agent operating system tool registry permission model
low code AI app generation workflow
self improving software agent repository inspection
mobile terminal development workflow Termux AI agent
application generator import export internal testing architecture

bootstrap_stages.title: Declare boundary
bootstrap_stages.purpose: Improve AI Workflow OS only. Do not contaminate target apps.

bootstrap_stages.title: Inspect self
bootstrap_stages.purpose: Inspect repo, CLI, dashboard, docs, adapters, and proof scripts.

bootstrap_stages.title: Build research graph
bootstrap_stages.purpose: Map market categories, patterns, APIs, CLIs, and app-builder ideas.

bootstrap_stages.title: Design next adapters
bootstrap_stages.purpose: Plan approved web, GitHub, package, model, and local-runtime adapters.

bootstrap_stages.title: Generate self patch plan
bootstrap_stages.purpose: Write an evidence-backed plan for improving this OS.

bootstrap_stages.title: Patch self
bootstrap_stages.purpose: Apply approved improvements to this repo only.

bootstrap_stages.title: Proof self
bootstrap_stages.purpose: Compile, verify CLI, verify UI endpoints, and write proof report.
